'''ngawobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yachtswoman|yachtswoman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yachtswoman|yachtswoman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngawobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæwebeth|ngæwebeth]] || [[word:ngæwebej|ngæwebej]] || [[word:ngæwebesh|ngæwebesh]] || [[word:ngæwebe|ngæwebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngawowoboth|ngawowoboth]] || [[word:ngawowoboj|ngawowoboj]] || [[word:ngawowobosh|ngawowobosh]] || [[word:ngawowobo|ngawowobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngawoboth|ngawoboth]] || [[word:ngawoboj|ngawoboj]] || [[word:ngawobosh|ngawobosh]] || [[word:ngawobo|ngawobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngawofboth|ngawofboth]] || [[word:ngawofboj|ngawofboj]] || [[word:ngawofbosh|ngawofbosh]] || [[word:ngawofbof|ngawofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngawobotho|ngawobotho]] || [[word:ngawobojo|ngawobojo]] || [[word:ngawobosho|ngawobosho]] || [[word:ngawoboko|ngawoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngawoboth|ngawoboth]] || [[word:ngawoboj|ngawoboj]] || [[word:ngawobosh|ngawobosh]] || [[word:ngawobo|ngawobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngawobothol|ngawobothol]] || [[word:ngawobojol|ngawobojol]] || [[word:ngawoboshol|ngawoboshol]] || [[word:ngawobokol|ngawobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngawobothotho|ngawobothotho]] || [[word:ngawobojojo|ngawobojojo]] || [[word:ngawoboshosho|ngawoboshosho]] || [[word:ngawoboko|ngawoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngawobothon|ngawobothon]] || [[word:ngawobojon|ngawobojon]] || [[word:ngawoboshon|ngawoboshon]] || [[word:ngawobokon|ngawobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngawobothoro|ngawobothoro]] || [[word:ngawobojoro|ngawobojoro]] || [[word:ngawoboshoro|ngawoboshoro]] || [[word:ngawobokoro|ngawobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
